source.body_text_sample:
Need help? Call us at 780-474-1104 or contact the Canadian Human Trafficking Hotline at 1-833-900-1010.  
Quick exit

About
Get Involved
English
Get Help
Donate
Join our team
Help support trauma-informed, life-changing care.

ACT provides direct front-line support to victims and survivors of human trafficking. Learn more about how you can create a life changing impact and work toward an Alberta free of human trafficking.  

Whether you support ACT as a survivor, an advocate, or because you believe in the importance of human rights for all, thank you.

Current Opportunities

ACT (Action Coalition on Human Trafficking)
